qa_pair.question: Scan the project in mcp/evals/fixture. How many nodes in its graph have kind "file"?
In the mcp/evals/fixture project, how many nodes match the query kind:class?
In the mcp/evals/fixture project, how many nodes match the query kind:function?
How many edges of kind "import" does the mcp/evals/fixture project's graph contain?
In the mcp/evals/fixture project, how many nodes match the query "kind:file OR kind:class"?
How many dependency-cycle insights does the mcp/evals/fixture project report?
In the mcp/evals/fixture project, how many other files import db.ts (its incoming import dependents)?
What is the total number of nodes in the mcp/evals/fixture project's graph?
Every edge in the mcp/evals/fixture project was resolved with the same confidence level. Which level (exact, inferred, or ambiguous)?
Among the top-level functions in the mcp/evals/fixture project, exactly one is never called by any other function in the project. What is its name?
